text: The signal is clear. We have one chance to move before nightfall.
信号很清楚。入夜前我们只有一次行动机会。
The forest path keeps us hidden. Move quietly and keep the lantern low.
森林小路能让我们隐蔽前进。放轻脚步，把灯压低。
The city gate is faster, but every guard will see us coming.
城门更快，但所有守卫都会看见我们。
Your badge opens the service road. That changes everything.
你的徽章能打开勤务道路。局势完全不同了。
你们悄无声息地抵达山脊。
You make it through, but the alarm bells are already ringing.
你们成功穿过，但警钟已经响起。
